title: CCRUM Notification 2026 - Apply Online for 176 Staff Nurse, Multi Tasking Staff and Other Posts
description: The Central Council for Research in Unani Medicine (CCRUM) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 176 Research Officer, Staff Nurse, Accounts Officer, Lab Technician, Pharmacist, and Upper Division Clerk posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their B. Pharm, B.Sc Nursing, GNM,12th, Diploma, DMLT, 10th, 12th, any degree, Post-graduation, BUMS can a...
